upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yatrA naraH samAsate sujAtAH' (f॰7.1.4) samAsate=saha Asate
'ime ca te sUryasamAnavarcasaH samAsate vftrahaRaH kratuM yaTA' (BA॰Adi॰55.8) ukto'rTaH
'pratyuvAca samAsInaM vasizWam' (rA॰2.111.8) samAsInam=AsInam samSabdo'kiYcitkaraH
'te ha vESvAnare samAsata tezAM na samiyAya' (Sa॰brA॰10.6.1.1) vESvAnara iti vESvAnaravizaye vicAraRAM pravartayituM samAsInA na ca tatra niScayaM gatA ityarTaH
'satyaM santaH samAsate' (BA॰SAM॰193.12) AsAdayantItyAha
'matsamo yadi saNgrAme SarAsanaDaraH kvacit vidyate taM samAcakzva yaH samAsIta mAM mfDe' (BA॰ASva॰29.6) samAsIta=madaBimuKaM tizWet mayA vigfhRIyAt
'ekEkaSaScOGabalAnimAn puruzasattamAn ko'nyaH samAseta (=samAsIta) kAlAntakayamAdfte' (BA॰vana॰313.27).. ukto'rTaH
'kastAn yuDi samAsIta jarAmaraRavAnnaraH' (BA॰vana॰10.27) virunDIta vigfhRItetyAha
'na nAgA na ca ganDarvAH… tava rAma raRe SaktAH SaravegaM samAsitum' (rA॰5.36.50) samAsitum=pratigrahItum=rodDum
'yUyaM sarve surasamA yena yudDe samAsitAH' (BA॰svargA॰1.14) samAsitAH=samAsannAH=kftasamAgamAH
'tridaSA'pi samudyuktA nAlaM BImaM samAsitum' (BA॰BIzma॰117.29) samAsitum=aBimuKe sTAtum taM paryavasTAtuM vA
'yasya pratItimADAtuM lakzaRA samupAsyate' (kA0 pra0 214) samupAsyate=ASrIyate
'saptame mantramaDyAsIta' (kO0 a0 11916) mantrArTaM (vivikte) AsItetyarTaH
'aye siMhAsanamaDyAste vfzalaH' (mudrA0 3) siMhAsanamaDitizWatItyarTaH
'aDyAssva cirarAtrAya pitfpEtAmahaM padam' (BA0 vana0) aDyAssva=aDitizWa
'evamAkulatAM yAtaH SrutvADyAsyAmahe vayam' (BA0 Salya0 4310) aDyAsyAmahe niScezyAmahe
'yasmAdasAvimAn viprAnaDyAste pratilomajaH' (BA0 pu0 107824) viprApekzayoccEstaramAsanamaDyAste itImamarTaM vivakzati purARakAraH
'vedA ye aDyAsate' (f0 1259) aDyAsate praSAsati tAn varuRo vedetyAha vedA ityatra sAMhitiko dIrGaH
'yadaDyAsitamarhaMdBistadDi tIrTaM pracakzate' (ku0 656) aDyAsitamaDyuzitaM sevitam
'DenvA tadaDyAsitakAtarAkzyA' (raGu0 252) tadaDyAsitA tena siMhenADyAsitA''krAntA''rUQA
'SrUyate hi purARepi jawilA nAma gOtamI fzInaDyAsitavatI sapta DarmaBftAM varA' (BA0 Adi 19614).. aDyAsitavatI vivAhasambanDena tEH sahozitavatItyarTaH
'parRaSAlAmaDyAsya' (raGu0 195) aDyAsya aDyuzyetyarTaH
'pAduke aDyAsya' (kaTA0 352) tayoScaraRanyAsaM kftvA
'BagavatyA prASnikapadamaDyAsitavyam' (mAla0 1) prASnikAsana Asitavyam prASnikADikAro grahItavya ityarTaH
'dvitIyamASramamaDyAsituM samayaH' (vikrama0 5) aDyAsituM pravezwum
'viDAya vEraM sAmarze naro'rO ya udAsate' (SiSu0 242) udAsate upekzante'nAsTAstizWanti tAwasTyena vartante
'tatkimityudAsate BaratAH' (mAlatI0 1) udAsate'cezwAH sTitAH
'udAsIno nirIkzasva na kAryaH saMBramastvayA' (BA0 Adi 15420) udAsIno vItacintaH
'anantaramariM vidyAdarisevinameva ca areranantaraM mitramudAsInaM tayoH param' (manu0 7158).. udAsIno na mitraM na cAmitraH
'yadA yajamAnaH same yiyakzate tadA same yajeteti vacanamudAste svArTasya prAptatvAt' (yAjYa0 181 mitAkzarAyAm) udAste pracodanAparANmuKamavatizWate prerakaM na BavatItyarTaH
'ekEkaSaScOGabalAnimAn ko'nyaH pratisamAseta kAlAntakayamAdfte' (BA0 vana0 31327).. pratisamAseta=pratisamAsIta saMmuKe tizWet
'droRakarRapraBftayo yena pratisamAsitAH' (BA0 ASvaM 6122) saMmuKIBUya paryavasTitAH
'na ca sarve raRe SaktA rAmaM pratisamAsitum' (rA0 56020) pratisamAsituM pratimuKe sTAtum pratipakzatayA sTAtum prAtiBawyenABimuKe sTAtum
'Sakzyanti hi mahAbAho pARqavAH saYjayEH saha DArtarAzwraM balaM GoraM krudDaM pratisamAsitum' (BA0 u0 8211)..
'na…BIzmadroRAdayo yudDe SakyAH pratisamAsitum' (BA0 vana0 4626).. ukto'rTaH
'pavitravantaH pari vAcamAsate' (f0 9733) paryAsate parita Asate
'pari tvAsate niDiBiH saKAyaH' (f0 101792)
'indavo madintamAsaH pari koSamAsate' (f0 9861) koSaM droRakalaSam ukto'rTaH
'praprAnye yanti paryanya Asate' (f0 393) paryAsate'lasA avyApArA anudyuktAstizWanti
'yuvo rarAvA pari saKyamAsate' (f0 10407) paryAsate prArTayante kAmayante'BIcCanti AtmanaM saKyAtpariharanti vyAvartayantIti tu saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH
'kimanye paryAsate'smatstomeBiraSvinA' (f0 888) paryAsate paryavasTAya Asate tizWanti pratirunDanti vArayantItyarTaH
'kaRqUM copajanayanto gadamuKaM paryAsate' (caraka0 vimAna0 713) paryAsate parivAryAsate
'puruzaM somyopatApinaM jYAtayaH paryupAsate jAnAsi mAM jAnAsi mAmiti' (CAM0 u0 8151) paryupAsate paritastizWanti
'yaTeha kzuDitA bAlA mAtaraM paryupAsate' (CAM0 u0 5245)
'etaccandramasastIrTamfzayaH paryupAsate' tIrTamupavasantItyarTaH
'striyo gItasvanaM tasya muditAH paryupAsate' (BA0 310412) tatra gItasvane saMnidaDate
'jayadraTe ca nihate tava BrAtfzu cAnaGa lakzmaRe tava putre ca kiM SezaM paryupAsmahe' (BA0 Salya0 412).. kaM saMSrayAmahe ityuktaM Bavati
'vIrAH saMBAvitAtmAno na dEvaM paryupAsate' (rA0 22316) ukto'rTaH
'aSaktA eva sarvatra narendraM paryupAsate' (paYcata0 1241) uditacara evArTaH
'tulyopyaBijane jAto na kaScita paryupAsate' (BA0 SAM0 3607) parityajya atiTiM na svakula Asta ityAha
'ete mayA mahAGorAH saNgrAmAH paryupAsitAH' (BA0 vana0 17120) paryupAsitA upasTAyAnuBUtAH
'saKi Sakuntale ucitaM naH paryupAsanamatiTInAm' (SA0 4) paryupAsanamupasTAnaM varivasyA SuSrUzA
'tadudakumBe upanihito Bavati tad brAhmaRa upAste' (Sa0 brA0 3325) upAste samIpa Asta AsIdati upaviSati
'yadeva sAyaM prAtarhavanIyam upa ca tizWata upa cAste' (Sa0 brA0 2324) ukto'rTaH
'tasmAduparyAsInaM kzatriyamaDastAdimAH prajA upAsate' (Sa0 brA0 13415) parAyattA iti SuSrUzava iti cADo'ntike tizWantItyAha
'taM GemitTA namasvina upa svarAjamAsate' (f0 1367) upAsate'rcanti
'upEnamADvaM sumanasyamAnAH' (f0 73314) he pratfdaH tftsava enaM vasizWamarcata tatra sAdarA BavatetyAha
'upAsate sutaM jAtaM SakuntA iva pippalam' (va0 Darma0 1139) upAsate saMSrayante upajIvanti
'aSaktAH pOruzaM kartuM klIbA dEvamupAsate' (Sukra0 148) dizwaM Srayante
'yaTA SreyasyAgamizyAvasaTenopakxptenopAsIta' (Sa0 brA0 2318) upAsIta satkuryAt saMBAvayet
'suKaM vA yadi vA duHKaM priyaM vA yadi vApriyam prAptaM prAptamupAsItaM hfdayenAparAjitaH' (BA0 SAM0 2526).. upAsIta seveta anuBavet
'upAsate ye gfhasTAH parapAkamabudDayaH' (manu0 3104) upAsate sevante
'soma ekeByaH pavate Gftameka upAsate' (f0 101541) upAsata upaBuYjate
'virocanaM samyagupAsyatAm' (suSruta0 218719) upAsyatAm prayujyatAm upayujyatAm
'sarve svaM BAgyamupAsate' (rA0 2273) ukto'rTaH
'tasmiMSca lOkike sAnubanDakAnAM prayogo nAstIti kftvA dvitIyaH prayoga upAsyate' (pA0 1121 sUtre BAzye) upAsyata ASrIyate
'upa ha vE tA (devatAH) Asate' (Sa0 brA0 19227) upAsate pratIkzante
'na SvaH SvamupAsIta ko hi manuzyasya Svo veda' (Sa0 brA0 2139) ukto'rTaH
'kzamAM kurvankAlamupAsate yaH' (BA0 vana0 519) upAsate upAste pratIkzate
'ye cArvato mAMsaBikzAmupAsate' (f0 116212) upAsate kANkzanti
'upAsate praSizaM yasya devAH' (f0 101212) upAsate prArTayante
'devA BAgaM yaTA pUrve saYjAnAnA upAsate' (f0 101912) upAsate svIkurvanti BAgaM havirlakzaRam
'tadalaM paritApena prAptakAlamupAsyatAm' (rA0 42511) upAsyatAmanuzWIyatAm
'yadahopAsate tenemAM mAnuzIM puraM jayanti' (Sa0 brA0 3444) upAsata upasIdanti vezwayanti
'vaSAmevAmftamAhurvaSAM mftyumupAsate' (aTarva0 101026) upAsate manyante jAnanti cintayanti
'tanmA nAvamupakalpyopaHsAsE' (Sa0 brA0 1814) mAmupAsAsE mAmavekzasva mAmanusareti yAvat
'jAgradDEvADvaryurupAsIta' (Sa0 brA0 39311) upAsIta=avatizWeta
'mAM DyAyanta upAsate' (gItA0 126) uktorTaH
'cirAcca pAkaM vayasaH karoti saMSoDanaM samyagupAsyamAnam' (azwANga0 sUtra0 1860) upAsyamAnaM sevyamAnam
'iti putragatAM cintAmupAsInasya BUpateH' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 447) upAsInasya saMSritavata AsTitavataH
'EndraM sTAnamupAsInAH' (manu0 593) upAsInAH prAptAH
'na tvayopAsitA vfdDAH' (BA0) yuDizWirasya BImaM pratyuktiH nopAsitA na sevitA na paricaritA na vinItavadupetAH
'upAsya rAtriSezaM tu SoRakUle maharziBiH' (rA0 1351) upAsya avasTAya uzitvA
'kAMcid velAmupAsyEva' (bf0 Slo0 5296) upAsya pratipAlya pratIkzya
'SAstraM gurumuKodIrRamAdAyopAsya cAsakft' (suSruta0 11411) upAsya aByasya
'na kAlAduttaraM kiM citkarma SakyamupAsitum' (rA0 4253) upAsitumanuzWAtum
'duHsahAni tu duHKAni mayA ninditaBAgyayA anuBUtAni tenAhaM SaktA duHKamupAsitum' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 514) upAsituM soQum
'alaM te pARquputrARAM BaktyA kleSamupAsitum' (BA0) upAsitum upaBoktum lyabarTe tumun
'AsanAvasaTO SayyAmanuvrajyAmupAsanam' (manu0 3107) upAsanaM paricaryA
'AcAryopAsanaM vedaSAstrArTezu vivekitA' (yAjYa0 3156) ukto'rTaH
'vraRyupAsanam' (suSruta0 1811) upAsanaM sevA
'tadDa tadvanaM tadvanamityupAsitavyam' (kenopa0 43) upAsitavyaM mantavyaM cintayitavyam
'upAsitA brAhmaRAnAm' (rA0 5326) upAsitA mAnayitA saMmAnayitA pUjakaH
'yaTA dve nAryAvekaM nfpatimupAsAte CatreREkA cAmareRa cAnyA' (bra0 sU0 SAM0 BA0 3312) upAsAte sevete

prayoga.literature_text: tAni sarvARi saMyamya yukta AsIta matparaH
manaH saMyamya maccitto yukta AsIta matparaH
